name: cloud-armor
title: GCP Firewall — Cloud Armor
summary: Creates a Cloud Armor security policy with IP-range and CEL/preconfigured-WAF rules (SQLi/XSS/etc), rate limiting and throttling, preview (log-only) mode, optional Adaptive Protection, and a configurable default rule.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Retained for convention parity (security policies are not labelable).

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code. Retained for convention parity (security policies are not labelable).

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Retained for convention parity; Cloud Armor security policies do not support labels.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: project_id
module.description: GCP project ID owning the security policy.

module.name: default_action
module.description: Action of the lowest-priority default rule: 'allow' or 'deny(403)' / 'deny(404)' / 'deny(502)'.

module.name: rules
module.type: map(object({ priority = number action = string description = optional(string) src_ip_ranges = optional(list(string), []) expression = optional(string) preview = optional(bool, false) rate_limit = optional(object({ count_per_interval = number interval_sec = number ban_duration_sec = optional(number) conform_action = optional(string, "allow") exceed_action = optional(string, "deny(429)") enforce_on_key = optional(string, "IP") })) }))
module.description: Map of Cloud Armor rules keyed by logical name. Use src_ip_ranges for simple IP allow/deny, or expression for CEL / preconfigured WAF rules (SQLi, XSS, LFI, etc). action = "throttle" requires rate_limit. preview = true evaluates and logs without enforcing.

module.name: adaptive_protection_enabled
module.description: Enable Adaptive Protection (ML-based L7 DDoS detection).

module.name: json_parsing
module.description: JSON parsing for WAF inspection: DISABLED or STANDARD.

outputs.name: firewall_ids
outputs.description: Map with single key 'policy' to the Cloud Armor security policy ID. Attach to backend services via this ID.

outputs.name: policy_self_link
outputs.description: Self-link of the security policy (accepted by backend service security_policy arguments).

outputs.name: rule_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical rule name to rule priority (Cloud Armor rules are addressed by priority within the policy).
